topStories.title: Congolese President Sassou Nguesso wins fifth term: Provisional results
topStories.description: Congolese President Denis Sassou Nguesso's election success will extend his nearly 42 years in power.

topStories.title: Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi quits Congress
topStories.description: The trigger for Bordoloi was the alleged humiliation by State party president Gaurav Gogoi over the selection of candidate for the Laharighat Assembly constituency

topStories.title: US lawmakers Murphy, Casar push legislation to regulate prediction markets
topStories.description: The legislation aims to prevent bets made based on insider knowledge of wars, economic policy and controllable events.

topStories.title: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, condemns attacks by Iran, 'agrees on safe navigation' through Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke with his UAE counterpart and condemned the attack on the Gulf country. PM Modi and UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan agreed on ensuring safe and free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran's IRGC has shut amid the ongoing war

topStories.title: Trump says it’s a ‘good thing’ counterterrorism director resigned over Iran
topStories.description: US President Trump reacted to the resignation of the US National Counterterrorism Centre’s director, Joe Kent.

topStories.title: President Droupadi Murmu serves Akshaya Patra’s 5 billionth meal at Rashtrapati Bhavan
PM Modi speaks to UAE President, agree on keeping Strait of Hormuz safe
topStories.description: Mr. Modi said he and the UAE President agreed on the importance of ensuring safe and free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz

topStories.title: US confirms 157 killed in maritime strikes experts call ‘extrajudicial’
topStories.description: Defence official tells Congress that 47 alleged drug-trafficking vessels have been struck since campaign began.

topStories.title: Over 200 signatories seek Rahul Gandhi’s apology for conduct within Parliament complex
topStories.description: The signatories allege that the Congress leader and other MPs organised a protest on the steps of Parliament despite the Speaker’s direction against any such demonstration within the premises

topStories.title: US visa April 2026 bulletin released: Check key updates on EB-1 to EB-5 categories, and family visa caps
topStories.description: Family-sponsored visas are capped at 226,000 and employment-based visas at a minimum of 140,000 annually, with per-country limits in place.

topStories.title: 'Will Work Together For Restoration Of Peace': PM Speaks To UAE President
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke to UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, discussed with him the current situation in West Asia and agreed on ensuring safe and free navigation...

dailyNews.title: 'Will Work Together For Restoration Of Peace': PM Speaks To UAE President
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke to UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, discussed with him the current situation in West Asia and agreed on ensuring safe and free navigation...

dailyNews.title: Trump slams Joe Kent over remarks on Iran war; says ‘If I hadn’t ended Obama's deal, nuclear war would have happened'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump responded to Joe Kent's resignation, calling him ‘very weak on security.' Kent resigned earlier today after he accused Israel of deceiving Trump into believing that Tehran was a threat.

dailyNews.title: Explosive claims by Trump's ex-counterterrorism official Joe Kent: 'Israel deceived Trump into believing...'
dailyNews.description: Joe Kent, Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, resigned from his post on Tuesday. In a post shared on X, Kent said that Iran posed no imminent threat, adding that the US President has been deceived by Israeli officials. He urged Trump to reverse the course and save American lives.

dailyNews.title: Trump Slams Joe Kent, Says It's 'Good' He Resigned After Downplaying Iran Threat
dailyNews.description: The US President added that while he found Kent to be "a nice guy," he had concerns about his stance on national security.

dailyNews.title: Trump faces global snub amid conflict with Iran: Spain says no to bases, allies reject Hormuz showdown
dailyNews.description: From Spain rejecting Trump's request to use jointly operated military bases on its territory to attack Iran to multiple Washington allies rejecting his call to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz – almost everyone has denied joining the war

dailyNews.title: US stock market crash fears ease even as Middle East war rages on
dailyNews.description: Options traders' fears of a U.S. stock market crash have significantly receded, with key indices like the Nations TailDex and Cboe Skew returning to pre-Iran strike levels. While the S&P 500 remains down, this pullback suggests investors are less concerned about a steep equity price drop, though overall market anxiety is still elevated.

dailyNews.title: ‘Don’t need, or desire NATO assistance': Trump's big claim after allies decline to get involved in West Asia conflict
dailyNews.description: Trump's post comes after he renewed his call for international partners to help restore shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, urging nations that rely on the critical oil transit corridor to take part in safeguarding the waterway

dailyNews.title: Trump-Xi meeting may be postponed: Beijing denies ‘false reports’, says delay not linked to Strait of Hormuz issue
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump is considering delaying his China visit, initially scheduled for later this month, as conflict escalates in the Middle East. The development comes days after Trump appealed to China and other allies to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump's Big U-Turn On Strait of Hormuz, Now Says US Doesn't Need NATO's Assistance
dailyNews.description: The US President had threatened that the NATO allies face a "very bad future" if they refuse to help secure the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, stresses on safe navigation through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: During this call, the two leaders discussed the rising tensions in the West Asian region.

dailyNews.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
dailyNews.description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

dailyNews.title: Boeing sees profit for commercial airplane division in 2027, later than expected
dailyNews.description: Boeing expects its commercial airplane ​division to turn a profit in 2027, not this year as previously expected due to higher-than-expected costs of its purchase of parts supplier Spirit AeroSystems, its chief financial ‌officer said ⁠on Tuesday, ⁠in a new setback for the U.S. planemaker.

dailyNews.title: Stryker says it’s restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices
dailyNews.description: The hack, which brought ongoing widespread disruption to the company's operations, is thought to be the first major cyberattack in the United States in response to the Trump administration's war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Chile's president begins building border barrier less than week into term
dailyNews.description: José Antonio Kast visited the ditch - a few feet wide and deep - on Monday, calling it a "milestone".

dailyNews.title: Newsom slams FCC’s Brendan Carr for threats against media, blasts Trump as 'Dear Leader'
dailyNews.description: Gavin Newsom called the FCC chair's media warning "sick," according to Semafor on Monday, and referred to President Donald Trump as "Dear Leader" during an interivew.

dailyNews.title: Ousted Hegseth aide resurfaces in intel role as Iran war sparks internal strain
dailyNews.description: Dan Caldwell, accused of leaking classified information, lands new role under Tulsi Gabbard amid Iran war escalation and Trump tensions.

dailyNews.title: Trump promised lower costs; the Iran conflict now threatens that pledge
dailyNews.description: The Federal Reserve weighs interest rate cuts as the Iran war complicates the inflation fight. Rising oil prices have created a challenging policy dilemma for the central bank.

dailyNews.title: Biden-appointed judge twice shut down by SCOTUS faces 'activist' fire after latest Trump policy block
dailyNews.description: Biden-appointed federal judge Brian Murphy faced DOJ criticism after being overturned multiple times by the Supreme Court, and now he has blocked Trump vaccine policies.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani references Palestinian 'genocide' during St Patrick's Day event
dailyNews.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani invoked Palestinian suffering during a St. Patrick’s Day event, drawing parallels with Irish history and praising former Irish President Mary Robinson’s human rights advocacy.

dailyNews.title: Cuba could experience freedom for 'first time in 70 years' within weeks, former Trump official predicts
dailyNews.description: Trump says he could bring freedom to Cuba for the first time in 70 years as former official predicts breakthrough amid the island's ongoing power crisis.

dailyNews.title: Joe Kent, a Top Counterterrorism Official for the Trump Administration, Resigns, Citing Iran War
dailyNews.description: Mr. Kent is the highest-ranking Trump administration official to quit in opposition to the conflict. He is also known for his support of conspiracy theories.
